description: High-level document outlining the project's goals, objectives, and scope.
steps_to_create: Define the project's purpose, goals, and deliverables.
Identify stakeholders and their roles.
Establish a project timeline and milestones.

description: Document outlining identified risks, their likelihood and impact, and mitigation strategies.
steps_to_create: Conduct a risk assessment to identify potential risks.
Evaluate the likelihood and impact of each risk.
Develop mitigation strategies for high-risk items.

description: Document outlining how project stakeholders will be informed and engaged throughout the project.
steps_to_create: Identify key stakeholders and their communication needs.
Develop a plan for regular progress updates.
Establish protocols for addressing concerns or issues.

description: Document outlining how stakeholders will be engaged and involved throughout the project.
steps_to_create: Identify key stakeholders and their roles.
Develop a plan for regular engagement activities.
Establish protocols for addressing concerns or issues.

description: Document outlining how changes to the project scope, timeline, or budget will be managed.
steps_to_create: Develop a change management process and procedures.
Establish protocols for assessing and approving changes.
Communicate changes to stakeholders.

description: Document outlining the project's budget and funding structure.
steps_to_create: Establish a budget for the project.
Identify funding sources and allocate funds to each component.

description: Template for creating a data sharing agreement between research institutions.
steps_to_create: Develop a template for the data sharing agreement.

description: Template for creating a data protection plan.
steps_to_create: Develop a template for the data protection plan.

description: Template for conducting a risk assessment.
steps_to_create: Develop a template for the risk assessment.
